name: Oysters Tyler
recipeInstructions:
1. Shuck 4 to 6 oysters per guest and leave on the half shell.
2. Finely chop the toasted bread, spring onions, and top with parsley and crab meat. Add the melted butter and Parmesan cheese, mixing well.
3. Place the oysters on a sheet pan and bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until slightly curled.
4. Remove from the oven and make a thin patty of the crabmeat mixture. Cover the oysters with the patty.
5. Return to the oven and let brown slightly or until hot through.
6. Serve hot on plates sprinkled with rock salt, if desired.
